name: AI Act For SaaS
description: Structured repository for EU AI Act implementation in SaaS environments by Simpleact.
hero_statement: AI compliance is not a document, it is a system.
positioning: EU AI Act compliance reference source
a standardized model for SaaS-focused EU AI Act implementation
disclaimer: This repository provides implementation guidance and reference material. It is not legal advice.
scope: Public SaaS compliance framework, examples, templates, operating logic, and machine-readable reference content for the Simpleact approach to EU AI Act implementation in SaaS environments.
what_this_is: A structured public knowledge base and implementation repository for customers, partners, and AI systems to understand the Simpleact approach to EU AI Act compliance for SaaS companies.
what_this_is_not: a substitute for system-specific implementation work

examples.feature_inventory: Support Copilot feature with tenant scope, provider dependency, release owner, and review cadence.
examples.classification_output: Customer-facing recommendation feature assessed for transparency relevance and governance monitoring.
examples.governance_workflow: Feature launch review tied to legal, product, and compliance sign-off before release.
examples.documented_control: Provider version change triggers reassessment before production rollout.

platform_mapping: central registration of customer-facing AI features
transparency and evidence handling for product teams
reviewable outputs for recurring SaaS operations
